scene.message: Will you enter Iwato?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Butterfly: I see. Then come{nl} once you are ready.{waitkey}{ret}
Butterfly: Are you ready{nl} now?{waitkey}{ret}
Rejoin your companions?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Butterfly: Come again{nl} once you are ready.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura...{nl} I'm counting on you.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: We're off, everyone.{nl} {ctl07:1}, let's go!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: What are you{nl} talking about?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Somehow...{nl} Sonomura looks happy.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: ...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Damn it!{nl} Why am I no good?{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Still not going?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Say hi to the{nl} real Maki for me!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: {ctl08:65281}Make sure you go{nl} and see Sonomura, okay!{waitkey}{ret}
